hook: Eye contact works when it feels connected, not when it feels like a test.
body: Good eye contact is about shared presence, not power signaling.

hook: Some men hear that eye contact matters and turn it into a rigid performance that feels unnatural.
body: Think of eye contact as checking in, not bearing down. Good eye contact is about shared presence, not power signaling.

body: Looking away naturally while listening and then returning with attention feels more human than freezing into a stare.
